free_text_summary: |
  Helix Therapeutics Inc. was found online in business directories and past press releases as a biopharmaceutical company based in New Haven, Connecticut. There is no public evidence linking Helix Therapeutics to the claimed shipping address in Cambridge. However, the shipping address (700 Main St, Cambridge, MA) is the flagship location of LabCentral, a well-known biotechnology incubator and shared laboratory space that hosts many biotech startups. It is possible the company operates out of this incubator, but there is no online presence confirming this specific tenant at the moment.
